## Phase

- [ ] Phase 0 — Operating System
- [ ] Phase 1 — Core Domain
- [ ] Phase 2 — Auth + Shell
- [ ] Phase 3 — Feed + Trivia Battle
- [ ] Phase 4 — Drop + Streaks + Open Debate
- [ ] Phase 5 — Prediction + Voice + Theater + Tribes

- [ ] Phase 7 — Polish + Launch

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm turbo lint typecheck test` green locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behavior
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or env values in the diff
- [ ] If migration: `schema-reviewer` subagent ran and approved
- [ ] If user-facing: `copy-linter` subagent ran and approved
- [ ] If engagement mechanic: `addiction-auditor` subagent ran and approved
- [ ] If auth/RLS/tokens: `security-reviewer` subagent ran and approved
- [ ] Source-of-truth docs updated if a decision changed
